name: vivicy
description: A visual autonomous dev factory: bring a canonical spec — import it, or build it by getting grilled by Vivi — then Vivicy proves the spikes, extracts traceable issues, and a two-agent loop implements, reviews, and verifies them, governed by change requests and readiness/merge-integrity checks, with every step live on the architecture map. Language- and project-agnostic.
author: Tomy Spagnoletti Duval

scripts.factory:test: node --test factory/progress-ledger.test.ts factory/semantic-extraction-check.test.ts factory/dev-loop.test.ts factory/traceability-check.test.ts factory/spike-check.test.ts factory/spike-prover.test.ts factory/reference-check.test.ts factory/map-review.test.ts factory/excerpt-drift.test.ts factory/change-control.test.ts factory/reopen.test.ts factory/atomic-write.test.ts factory/doc-baseline.test.ts factory/extract-issues.test.ts factory/install-skills.test.ts factory/leg-timeout.test.ts factory/project-config.test.ts factory/prompts.test.ts factory/cli.test.ts factory/prepare-docs.test.ts factory/text-extract.test.ts
